criteria_results.criterion: tmux.ts に NAVIGATION_KEY_VALUES, NavigationKey型, isAllowedSpecialKey(), sendSpecialKeysAndInvalidate() が export されている
criteria_results.details: tmux.ts lines 486-517: NAVIGATION_KEY_VALUES as const array (6 keys), NavigationKey type, isAllowedSpecialKey() type guard, sendSpecialKeysAndInvalidate() wrapper all exported correctly.

criteria_results.criterion: cli-patterns.ts に OPENCODE_SELECTION_LIST_PATTERN が定義されている
criteria_results.details: cli-patterns.ts line 211: OPENCODE_SELECTION_LIST_PATTERN = /^>\s+\S|^filter:\s/m exported as placeholder pattern.

criteria_results.criterion: status-detector.ts の priority 2.5 ブロック内で selection_list 検出分岐が実装されている
criteria_results.details: status-detector.ts lines 265-277: (C) selection_list detection inserted between (B) thinking and (D) response_complete within OpenCode priority 2.5 block. Uses STATUS_REASON.OPENCODE_SELECTION_LIST constant. Returns status='waiting', confidence='high', hasActivePrompt=false.

criteria_results.criterion: POST /api/worktrees/[id]/special-keys エンドポイントが多層防御で実装されている
criteria_results.details: special-keys/route.ts: 6-layer defense implemented - (0) JSON parse [DR4-002], (1) cliToolId validation, (2) keys type validation [DR4-004], (3) keys content + MAX_KEYS_LENGTH=10, (4) DB check, (5) session check, (6) sendSpecialKeysAndInvalidate. All error responses use fixed strings [DR4-003].

criteria_results.criterion: current-output API レスポンスに isSelectionListActive フラグが追加されている
criteria_results.details: current-output/route.ts lines 96-97, 132: isSelectionListActive derived from statusResult using STATUS_REASON.OPENCODE_SELECTION_LIST constant [DR2-003].

criteria_results.criterion: NavigationButtons コンポーネントが Up/Down/Enter/Escape ボタンを表示する
criteria_results.details: NavigationButtons.tsx: 4 buttons (Up/Down/Enter/Escape) with min-w-[44px] min-h-[44px] touch targets, keyboard handling, role=toolbar, aria-labels. No dangerouslySetInnerHTML [DR4-006].

criteria_results.criterion: WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx が isSelectionListActive に基づいて NavigationButtons を条件付き表示する
criteria_results.details: WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx: CliStatus interface updated with isSelectionListActive [DR3-003], state tracked via useState (line 1068), updated from polling (line 1241), conditional rendering at desktop (line 2326) and mobile (line 2582).

criteria_results.criterion: 既存テストが全てパスする
criteria_results.details: 247 test files, 4900 tests passed, 7 skipped, 0 failed.

criteria_results.criterion: TypeScript型チェック・ESLintエラーが0件
criteria_results.details: npx tsc --noEmit: 0 errors. npm run lint: No ESLint warnings or errors.

criteria_results.criterion: 既存の他CLIツール（Claude/Codex/Gemini）の操作に影響を与えない
criteria_results.details: Selection list detection is guarded by cliToolId === 'opencode' check in status-detector.ts. NAVIGATION_KEY_VALUES is separate from SPECIAL_KEY_VALUES [DR3-001]. Tests confirm Claude/Codex do not trigger selection_list reason.

details: [DR3-001] NAVIGATION_KEY_VALUES separate from SPECIAL_KEY_VALUES - VERIFIED
[DR2-004] as const array + isAllowedSpecialKey() type guard pattern - VERIFIED
[DR1-003] sendSpecialKeysAndInvalidate() wrapper in tmux.ts - VERIFIED
[DR4-002] JSON parse defense with try-catch on req.json() - VERIFIED
[DR4-003] Fixed-string error responses, no params.id/cliToolId in messages - VERIFIED
[DR4-004] Array.isArray + typeof string + empty array checks on keys - VERIFIED
[DR2-003] STATUS_REASON constants shared between status-detector and current-output route - VERIFIED
[DR3-003] CliStatus interface updated with isSelectionListActive - VERIFIED
[DR1-001] Validation structure mirrors terminal/route.ts - VERIFIED
[DR1-007] Boolean status flag count at 6 (within threshold) - VERIFIED
[DR2-001] Flag count based on boolean status flags only - VERIFIED
[DR2-002] sendSpecialKeysAndInvalidate only wraps sendSpecialKeys+invalidateCache pattern - VERIFIED
[DR3-002] Regression tests for normal response, response_complete priority, and exclusivity - VERIFIED
[DR3-004] Selection list detection uses contentCheckWindow - VERIFIED
[DR3-005] prompt-answer-sender.ts not modified (scope boundary) - VERIFIED
[DR4-001] Rate limiting intentionally not implemented (documented) - VERIFIED
[DR4-005] middleware matcher auto-protects /api/worktrees/[id]/* paths - VERIFIED
[DR4-006] No dangerouslySetInnerHTML in NavigationButtons - VERIFIED

test_cases.scenario: isAllowedSpecialKey('Up') が true を返す
test_cases.evidence: tmux-navigation.test.ts: isAllowedSpecialKey returns true for each NAVIGATION_KEY_VALUES entry

test_cases.scenario: isAllowedSpecialKey('InvalidKey') が false を返す
test_cases.evidence: tmux-navigation.test.ts: returns false for C-c, C-d, Left, Right, Space, empty string, arbitrary-key, rm -rf /

test_cases.scenario: OPENCODE_SELECTION_LIST_PATTERN がOpenCode選択リスト出力にマッチする
detectSessionStatus() で opencode_selection_list reason が返される
test_cases.evidence: status-detector-selection.test.ts: returns waiting/high/opencode_selection_list for selection list output

test_cases.scenario: detectSessionStatus() で他CLIツール出力に対してselection_listが返されない
test_cases.evidence: status-detector-selection.test.ts: Claude and Codex outputs do not trigger selection_list reason

test_cases.scenario: special-keys API に有効なキーを送信して200が返る
test_cases.evidence: special-keys-route.test.ts: 200 with {success: true} for valid keys ['Up'] and ['Down','Down','Enter']

test_cases.scenario: special-keys API に不正なキーを送信して400が返る
test_cases.evidence: special-keys-route.test.ts: 400 with 'Invalid special key' for disallowed keys like 'C-c'

test_cases.scenario: special-keys API に空配列を送信して400が返る
test_cases.evidence: special-keys-route.test.ts: 400 with 'Invalid keys parameter' for empty array

test_cases.scenario: special-keys API に10を超えるキーを送信して400が返る
test_cases.evidence: special-keys-route.test.ts: 400 for 11 keys, 200 for exactly 10 keys (boundary test)

selection_list detection in priority 2.5 block of status-detector.ts
isSelectionListActive flag in current-output API response
No impact on other CLI tools (Claude/Codex/Gemini)

notes: All 10 acceptance criteria verified. All 13 test scenarios passed. Design policy compliance: 20/20 checklist items verified. 43 new tests across 4 test files. No regressions in existing 4900 tests. TypeScript 0 errors, ESLint 0 errors.
